content.full_text:
October 25, 1990

BY FAX AND BY REGULAR MAIL

Ms. Bianca Breeze
California Fair Political Practices Commission
Post Office Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Ms. Breeze:

Kindly accept this facsimile letter as a memorialization of our telephone conversation of this date wherein you advised that the requirements of the Government Code, specifically Sections No. 84507 and 84500, et seq. are satisfied under the circumstances wherein a television station is providing free air time if the following announcements are printed: "Provided by Californians for a Citizen Government/Yes on Proposition 140, Major Funding - The Schabarum Fund for California's Future" and further that "Major Funding - The Schabarum Fund for California's Future" is by voice, also. I understand that the requirement of the Government Code is specifically the voice announcement as described above.

If this letter does not accurately reflect our discussion, and your comments and advice, I would appreciate a phone call to Mrs. Barbara Hulse at my office, which number is (818) 967-4302.

Thank you for your patience in discussing this matter with me at various times.

Sincerely,

Robert E. Weiss, Treasurer
Californians for a Citizen Government
